title: User Registration - Valid Input
description: Test successful user registration with valid email and password
steps: Verify response contains userId and email
expected_result: User is successfully registered and returns user ID and email

title: User Registration - Duplicate Email
description: Test registration fails when email already exists
steps: Register a user with email test@example.com
Attempt to register another user with same email test@example.com
expected_result: Server returns 400 error with 'email already exists' message

title: User Login - Valid Credentials
description: Test successful login with valid email and password
steps: POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password
Verify token is a valid JWT string
expected_result: User receives access token and refresh token, HTTP 200 returned

title: User Login - Invalid Credentials
description: Test login fails with wrong password
steps: POST /api/auth/login with valid email but wrong password
expected_result: Server returns 401 error with 'Invalid credentials' message

title: Create Customer - Agent Authorization
description: Test agent can create a new customer record
steps: POST /api/customers with business name, owner name, email, utility type
Verify response contains customerId and created customer data
expected_result: Customer is created and returned with all details

title: Get Customers - Agent View
description: Test agent can retrieve customer list
steps: Verify response is a list of customers
expected_result: Customers list is returned with customer records

title: Update Customer - Agent Authorization
description: Test agent can update customer details
steps: Verify response contains updated customer data
expected_result: Customer record is updated successfully

title: Add Electricity Meter - Customer Utility Details
description: Test agent can add electricity meter to customer
steps: POST /api/customers/{id}/electricity-meters with meter number, supplier, rates
expected_result: Electricity meter is added to customer record

title: Add Gas Meter - Customer Utility Details
description: Test agent can add gas meter to customer
steps: POST /api/customers/{id}/gas-meters with meter number, supplier, rates
expected_result: Gas meter is added to customer record

title: AI Extraction - Parse Unstructured Notes
description: Test AI module extracts utility data from call notes
steps: POST /api/ai/extract with call notes containing meter details
Verify response contains extracted meters array
Verify extracted data includes current and offered rates
expected_result: AI successfully extracts electricity and gas meter data from notes

title: AI Extraction - Fallback to Regex
description: Test regex fallback when Cohere API is unavailable
steps: Disable or simulate Cohere API failure
Verify response still contains extracted meters
expected_result: System falls back to regex extraction and returns results

title: Create Callback - Schedule & Pricing
description: Test agent can create callback with multiple pricing offers
steps: POST /api/callbacks with customerId, scheduledDate, electricity rates, gas rates
expected_result: Callback is created with pricing offers and scheduled date

title: Update Callback Status - Complete
description: Test agent can mark callback as done
expected_result: Callback status is updated to done

title: Get Callbacks - Agent Filter
description: Test agent can retrieve their callbacks
steps: Verify response contains agent's callbacks only
expected_result: Callbacks list filtered by agent is returned

title: Create Transfer - Account Details
description: Test agent can create transfer with banking information
steps: POST /api/transfers with customerId, accountNumber, sortCode, paymentMethod
expected_result: Transfer is created with banking details securely stored

title: Get Transfers - Agent Filter
description: Test agent can retrieve their transfers
steps: Verify response contains agent's transfers only
expected_result: Transfers list filtered by agent is returned

title: Create Sale - Final Submission
description: Test agent can submit final sale with banking and contract info
expected_result: Sale is created and submitted for processing

title: Get Sales - Agent Filter
description: Test agent can retrieve their sales
steps: Verify response contains agent's sales only
expected_result: Sales list filtered by agent is returned

title: Manager Dashboard - Team Analytics
description: Test manager can view team performance metrics
steps: Verify includes agent conversion rates and activity
expected_result: Manager dashboard displays team analytics and performance

title: Manager Callback Assignment - Reassign
description: Test manager can reassign callbacks to agents
expected_result: Callback is successfully reassigned to new agent

title: Admin User Management - Create Manager
description: Test admin can create new manager accounts
expected_result: Manager account is created by admin

title: Admin User Management - Create Agent
description: Test admin can create new agent accounts
steps: POST /api/admin/agents with email, password, managerId, role='agent'
expected_result: Agent account is created by admin

title: Admin Audit Log - Security Events
description: Test admin can view platform-wide audit log
steps: Verify includes user login/logout and data modifications
expected_result: Audit log displays all security events platform-wide

title: Rate Limiting - API Throttling
description: Test rate limiting protects API from abuse
steps: Verify response contains 'rate limit exceeded' error
expected_result: API enforces 60 requests per minute rate limit

title: SQL Injection Protection - Middleware
description: Test SQL injection attempts are blocked
steps: POST /api/customers with SQL injection payload in businessName
Verify request is rejected or sanitized
expected_result: SQL injection attempt is blocked by security middleware

title: JWT Token Expiration - Access Denied
description: Test expired JWT token denies API access
steps: Wait for token to expire (after 2 hours in test environment)
expected_result: Expired token is rejected and user must re-authenticate

title: RBAC - Agent Cannot Access Admin Panel
description: Test role-based access control prevents unauthorized access
expected_result: Agent is denied access to admin endpoints

title: CORS Policy - Cross-Origin Requests
description: Test CORS policy allows only whitelisted origins
steps: Verify first request succeeds, second is blocked
expected_result: CORS policy correctly enforces origin whitelist

title: Callback Scheduling - Date Validation
description: Test callback scheduled date cannot be in the past
steps: POST /api/callbacks with scheduledDate in the past
expected_result: Past date is rejected with validation error

title: Customer Email Validation - Format Check
description: Test email validation in customer creation
expected_result: Invalid email format is rejected

title: Manager Delete Callback - Agent Constraint
description: Test that a manager can delete a callback belonging to their team, but not one from another team
steps: Attempt to delete a callback of an agent managed by them
Attempt to delete a callback of an agent not managed by them
expected_result: Manager is restricted to deleting team-only callbacks

title: Manager Update Sale - Agent Constraint
description: Test that a manager can modify a sale belonging to their team, but not one from another team
steps: PUT /api/manager/sales/{id} for their team agent's sale
Verify response is HTTP 200 and maps to SaleOut
PUT /api/manager/sales/{id} for another team's agent's sale
expected_result: Manager is restricted to updating team-only sales and response is successfully serialized

title: Admin User Management - Delete User Cascade
description: Test that deleting an agent deletes all their associated records (callbacks, transfers, sales, customers) to avoid orphaned records
steps: DELETE /api/admin/user/{id} for an agent with existing customers, callbacks, transfers, and sales
Verify from database that agent and all associated records are permanently deleted
expected_result: Agent and all associated records are permanently cascading deleted from database

title: Admin User Management - Assign Agent to Manager
description: Test admin can reassign an agent to a different manager
steps: PATCH /api/admin/assign-agent with agentId and new managerId
Verify agent's manager ID is updated to the new manager
expected_result: Agent is successfully reassigned to new manager

title: Manager Notifications Feed
description: Test that a manager can retrieve a timeline of team events
steps: Verify response contains recent team transfer and sale events by their agents in ISO format
expected_result: Manager notifications list returns recent team activities
